Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you do not.

Spending Stats

Weekly, monthly and yearly breakdowns. Beautiful charts that show exactly where your money goes.

Saving Goals

Set targets and track progress in real time. Holiday, house deposit, new car. Set it and hit it.

Net Worth Tracker

Cards, investments, property and vehicles. Your complete financial picture in one place.

Recurring Bills

Track every subscription and direct debit. Know your monthly outgoings. Never miss a payment.

Live Markets

Real time trading signals for stocks, crypto and commodities. Stay ahead of the market. Premium only.

9 Languages

Built for everyone. Fully translated into 9 languages with support for 8 major currencies.
